ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Cherry, flesh and skin, pitted, raw
Pineapple, in pineapple juice, canned, drained

ingredients_text: Almonds (25%), Walnuts (25%), Golden Raisins (20%) [Raisins, Sunflower Oil, Preservative (Sulphur Dioxide)], Sweetened Dried Cherries (15%) [Cherry, Sugar, Sunflower Oil], Pineapple Juice Infused Cranberries (15%) [Cranberry, Pineapple Juice from Concentrate, Sunflower Oil]
